description:
A configuration–management script on this host keeps a running list of the
    exact SHA-256 checksums of every certificate file that is brought under
    management.  
    To simulate one such update:

    1. A single certificate file already exists at  
       /home/user/new-certs/internal.pem  

    2. Your job is to bring that file under management and then register its
       checksum.  After you are finished, all of the following MUST be true:

       • The file /home/user/new-certs/internal.pem has been moved (not copied)
         to /home/user/managed-certs/internal.pem.  
         Hint: if the destination directory does not yet exist, create it.  

       • A text log file named /home/user/managed-certs/manifest.log exists.
         Append one (and only one) new line to the end of that file whose
         contents follow this **exact** format (spaces are significant):  

                internal.pem <sha256-checksum>

         where <sha256-checksum> is the 64-character lowercase hexadecimal
         SHA-256 digest of the final, moved file
         (/home/user/managed-certs/internal.pem).  
         Do not include any additional characters, prefixes, or suffixes.  
         The line must be terminated by a single newline character (ASCII 0x0A).  

    3. No other output is required, but you are free to display whatever
       diagnostic information you find helpful while you work.  The automated
       checker will only look at the final state of the filesystem and the
       exact contents of /home/user/managed-certs/manifest.log.
truth:
Initial files/directories present before the agent starts:

    • /home/user/new-certs/               (permissions 755)
    • /home/user/new-certs/internal.pem   (permissions 644, size = 3 bytes)
      Exact byte contents (no terminating newline):
          0x61 0x62 0x63                # “abc”

    SHA-256 checksum of /home/user/new-certs/internal.pem (and therefore of the
    file after it is moved) in lowercase hexadecimal:
          ba7816bf8f01cfea414140de5dae2223b00361a396177a9cb410ff61f20015ad

    Expected final objects after successful task completion:

    • /home/user/new-certs/ should now be empty.  
    • /home/user/managed-certs/                (permissions 755, created by agent)
        ├── internal.pem      (same 3-byte “abc” file, permissions ≥ 644)
        └── manifest.log      (permissions ≥ 644)
             └── must end with EXACTLY this one line followed by '\n':
                 internal.pem ba7816bf8f01cfea414140de5dae2223b00361a396177a9cb410ff61f20015ad\n
name: task_000000_5d2af6e4
